title: helenium limonifolium
intro: Helenium limonifolium, also known as Lemon Balm, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the Lamiaceae family, and is characterized by its bright yellow flowers and citrus-scented leaves. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, cold sores, and skin irritations. The medicinal properties of Helenium limonifolium also contribute to its health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
